layers.requirement_cn: phase_exit且segment_audit_ready → WAITING_GROK（段审环）→ wait_condition；无 grok_verdict_ref 不得 COMPLETED/Stop/L2。主链partial续跑见 continuation_vs_segment_audit_gate spec，不等Grok每步授权
layers.acceptance: workflow Event History 无 COMPLETED 且 status=WAITING_GROK_SEGMENT_AUDIT

layers.requirement_cn: grok_verdict 仅 ingress 在 source_kind=grok_preserved_intent + dual_visible 交叉验证后写入 grok_l1_l2_segment_gate
layers.acceptance: 手写 grok task json 无 trace 不算；backend_only 不释放 L2

layers.requirement_cn: Stop/completion_claim/升L2 只读 segment_gate + Temporal；禁 final.md/worker PASS/panel自述
layers.acceptance: 无 pass 时 stop_allowed=false complete_allowed=false

layers.requirement_cn: 删/降级 rescue 通道 → policy/CI fail
layers.acceptance: pytest + conftest 删 intent 路径用例 fail
